name: linq-pp-mcp
description: Agent-native messaging API for chats, messages, attachments, phone numbers, contact cards, capability checks, and webhooks

linq_api_key.title: LINQ_API_KEY
linq_api_key.description: Optional. Sets LINQ_API_KEY for the Linq MCP server. Get a credential from https://dashboard.linqapp.com/sandbox-signup.

linq_api_v3_api_key.title: LINQ_API_V3_API_KEY
linq_api_v3_api_key.description: Optional. Sets LINQ_API_V3_API_KEY for the Linq MCP server. Get a credential from https://dashboard.linqapp.com/sandbox-signup.
